summary: Completed comprehensive testing of refactored top navigation UI alignment and professional styling. Navigation layout successfully implements SaaS-grade design with proper flexbox alignment, consistent button sizing, logical grouping, and no duplicate LIVE buttons.

integration_issues.issue: DOM element detachment during navigation testing after successful page navigation
integration_issues.note: This is a testing artifact, not a functional issue. Navigation works correctly but Playwright loses element references after page navigation in SPA.

passed_tests: Dashboard page loads with new navigation structure
Navigation buttons have consistent sizing (36px height)
Mode selection toggle (Backtest/Forward/Live Trading) works correctly
All core navigation buttons found and properly styled (Analyze, Discover, Library)
All system/management buttons found (Config, Portfolio, Monitor)
No duplicate LIVE buttons - only 'Live Trading' mode toggle and 'Monitor' nav button
Visual separators properly divide navigation groups
Professional SaaS-grade styling with proper hover states
Status indicator and build version display correctly
Flexbox layout with proper justify-between alignment
Three logical groups: Mode Selection | Core Features | System/Management
